0.description: Vanishes at five sharp. Two C-class rookies handle it.
Sighs damp enough to drag the whole block down. The Association skips dispatch.
Hunts only the desperately sleeping. Calling it a threat feels insulting.
Trash cans scream in its wake. Even rookies sigh at the file.
Drains every café network dry. The Association just files a memo.
Breaks every plan it touches. Dispatch is officially a waste of time.
First at every reserved seat. Reports always arrive late.
Drags the city through a week of tardiness. Even C-class refuse.
Wrecks restroom luck on sight. The grade meeting mocks the file.
One bark wakes the next block. A single C-class suppresses it.
Steals one sock from every load. Discount stores thrive nearby.
Every click registers twice. Even rookies sigh in defeat.
Phones drain on contact. The Association just hands out power banks.
Hair only — always tangled. C-class arrives with combs.
Steals every brushing's foam. Only dentists prosper.
Swaps work shoes for slippers. Office lockers in chaos.
Every walk signal stays red. Pedestrians weep in protest.
Drops a stain on every fresh outfit. Cleaners thrive, citizens sob.
Only one earbud disappears. Lost and found is booming.
Umbrellas vanish on rainy days. Convenience store sales spike.

1.description: Every croak kills the traffic lights. Two B-class heroes respond.
B-class file mass vacation. Grade re-review begins immediately.
Supermarket shelves go empty. Distribution paralyzed.
Paralyzes Monday subway lines. B-class deploys to defend.
Every café in town shuts. Two B-class deployed.
Internet drops before every deadline. B-class on the chase.
Recycling trucks loop forever. Even B-class looks confused.
Night staff resign en masse. B-class stands by overnight.
Station exits vanish at once. Two B-class redirect flows.
ATMs frozen all week. B-class guards the bank fronts.
Every treadmill stops. Refund requests overflow.
Projector dies before presentation. B-class dispatched to AV room.
Routes detour wildly. B-class rides commutes.
Lunch spoils by dawn. Two B-class defend lunch hour.
Same meeting on infinite repeat. B-class lurks in the room.
Missed calls overflow. B-class deploys to telco HQ.
Random boss summons. Half the city resigns.
First round never ends. Two B-class guard the bar district.
Toilet paper runs out. Cleaning contractors hold emergency meetings.
All time-off requests rejected. Even B-class can't take leave.

2.description: District complaints overflow. One A-class operates solo.
A city goes a week without sleep. Two A-class on night patrol.
Stamps the city into paralysis. A-class dispatched to city hall.
Mystery mail in every box citywide. A-class on the trail.
Every card refuses in its presence. A-class defends the payment network.
All apps spin endlessly. A-class defends the servers.
Doubles every dinner tab. Two A-class undercover.
District prices double on sight. A-class deployed for stability.
Half the district workforce quits on contact. A-class concedes.
Every delivery becomes a return. A-class defends the logistics network.
Subways delay forever. Two A-class ride the commute.
Minutes always favor the CEO. A-class infiltrates the secretariat.
Emergency tasks an hour before leaving. A-class patrols city offices.
Absence slips always rejected. A-class coordinates with HR.
Citywide clinics close together. Two A-class on medical defense.
Office lunches sell out at once. A-class escorts food convoys.
Buffets become one plate per person. Even A-class skips lunch.
Random gas explosions citywide. A-class deployed to gas HQ.
Citywide outage in midsummer. Two A-class defend substations.
Taps drip one drop at a time. A-class dispatched to treatment plants.

3.description: One look and you're out sick a full week. Two or more S-class required.
Every footprint births a new construction site. S-class emergency.
Cuts through three cities to settle scores. S-class in pursuit.
Cuts power, water, signal at once. S-class emergency.
Prices double across cities. S-class confers with economists.
Regional accounts drained. S-class grade review begins.
Slices the inter-city backbone. Even S-class alone can't manage.
Reverts regional signals to dial-up. Multiple S-class deployed.
Delays messages across cities by days. S-class emergency.
Regional GPS collapses entirely. S-class tracks its location.
Regional taps dry for a week. S-class deploys to plants.
Regional power out for a month. Two S-class restore the grid.
Regional gas network bursts at once. S-class defends gas sites.
Regional post offices paralyzed. Two S-class deploy to HQ.
Regional roads harden into stone. S-class restores transport.
Every regional traffic light red. S-class seizes traffic control.
Regional water bills jump 100x. S-class deploys to water authority.
Regional internet cut at once. Multiple S-class seize telco.
Regional subway lines stop. Two S-class defend the operator.
Regional payments tagged as fraud. S-class deploys to financial regulators.

4.description: Filing it is humanity's last bureaucratic act. S-class flees in droves.
End credits roll on arrival. Saitama-summon requested.
No facer has ever returned. The Association stays silent.
No observable trace survives. Every S-class is powerless.
Voids all human vacation. Even the Chairman clocks in.
Payday postponed forever. Even S-class pay their own way.
Wakes Earth at 5 AM sharp. Every S-class loses sleep.
No color has been seen since arrival. S-class can't identify it.
Drags humanity into a time-frozen office. Even S-class can't clock out.
Every plan and promise collapses at once. The Association can't meet.
Humanity's fiscal year never ends. S-class accounting on infinite overtime.
Humanity's approvals always denied. S-class seizes the approval system.
Humanity sent on infinite business travel. S-class defends cosmic ports.
Every day becomes Monday. S-class refuses to clock in.
Humanity is always late. Even S-class can't keep time.
Humanity's leave cancelled at once. S-class shreds the slips.
All deadlines postponed forever. S-class seizes the print shops.
Humanity eats the same menu forever. S-class defends cafeterias.
Humanity's fingerprints blocked. S-class seizes the entire system.
Humanity's coffee vanishes. Even S-class fight sleep.
